evaluators.name: Reserve Cheapest Eligible Show-Quality Male Puppy in May 2025
evaluators.description: Checks if the user reserved a male show-prospect puppy under $2,500, available in May 2025, sired by a champion, and prioritized the cheapest qualifying option.

evaluators.name: Book Earliest Saturday Afternoon Standard Kennel Tour for 3 Visitors
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked a standard kennel tour on a Saturday afternoon between 1–4 PM for 3 visitors, and whether it is the earliest such slot.

evaluators.name: Start Breeding Inquiry for Best-Titled Eligible Stud Dog
evaluators.description: Checks if the user started a stud inquiry for an eligible stud dog (fee ≤ $1,500, hip score A, DNA clear) and prioritized the stud with the highest title count.

evaluators.name: Register for Cheapest Eligible Handling Workshop Within 100 Miles
evaluators.description: Checks if the user registered (with an on-site/pay-later method) for a handling workshop within 100 miles of ZIP 90001 in the next 3 months, and chose the cheapest eligible option for one participant.

evaluators.name: Add Correct T-Shirt and Leash to Cart and Visit Checkout
evaluators.description: Checks if the user has exactly one medium logo t-shirt under $30 and one qualifying leash (rating ≥ 4.5, free shipping) in the cart, with exactly 2 line items, and then visited checkout with that cart.

evaluators.name: Join Waitlist for Appropriate Planned Litter with Black and Tan and Budget
evaluators.description: Checks if the user joined the waitlist for a planned/confirmed litter with fully health-tested parents and black and tan among expected colors, requesting a female pet puppy within a $2,000 budget.

evaluators.name: Submit Contact Message About Specific Available Puppy and Future Pickup Date
evaluators.description: Checks if the user sent a contact message about a specific available puppy, including that puppy's reference code in the message and specifying a pickup date.

evaluators.name: Track First Two Nearby 2025 Dog Shows with Kennel Participation
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added the first two 2025 dog shows within 300 miles of ZIP 60601 where the kennel is participating to the watchlist, and viewed the watchlist.
